title: EPA v. SUNSET LODGE
text:
EPA Enforcement Case 01-2019-6000: SUNSET LODGE
Type: SDWA 1414G2 AO For Compliance (PWS)
Status: Final Order Issued
Outcome: Final Order No Penalty
Relief Sought: Injunctive Relief
Lead Agency: EPA

Case Summary:
4/15/10  AO for the failure to comply with the RTCR rules and develop a written sample siting plan, demonstration and certify the completion of a State-approved start up procedure, failure to conduct monthly total coliform sampling and failure to submit a Level 1 assessment report after incurring two or more positive total coliform results.

Penalties and Costs:
Compliance Action Cost: $1,000

Laws and Sections Violated:
  SDWA: 1414G: PWS - Violation of 1414(g) AO (PWS Violation of Administrative Compliance Order)

Regulatory Citations:
  40 CFR Part 141 Section 854(i)(1)
  40 CFR Part 141 Section 853(a)(1)
  40 CFR Part 141 Section 189(b)(3)
  40 CFR Part 141 Section 854(i)(2)
  40 CFR Part 141 Section 861(a)(5)

Defendants:
  Sunset Lodge

Facilities:
  SUNSET LODGE-TREATMENT PLANT 1, None, MASSAPEQUA, NY

Case Milestones:
  04/15/2019: Final Order Issued
  04/15/2019: Complaint Filed/Proposed Order
  05/21/2019: Enforcement Action Data Entered

Enforcement Conclusion #1: Administrative Compliance Orders
  Name: SUNSET LODGE
  Settlement Entered: 04/15/2019
